---
title: "Topic Modelling"
subtitle: "Subtitle TBD"
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
authors:
  - name: Zachary Batist
    id: zb
    email: zachary.batist@mcgill.ca
    url: https://zackbatist.info
    orcid: 0000-0003-0435-508X
    affiliations:
      - name: McGill University
        department: Epidemiology, Biostatistics and Occupational Health
        city: Montreal
        region: Québec
        country: Canada
  - name: Melissa Ouellet
    id: mo
    email: melissa.ouellet@mcgill.ca
    # url: 
    # orcid: 
    affiliations:
      - name: McGill University
        department: Epidemiology, Biostatistics and Occupational Health
        city: Montreal
        region: Québec
        country: Canada
abstract: |
  XXXX
keywords:
  - aaa
  - bbb
  - ccc
filters: 
  - ../assets/count-para.lua
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top = 1in
      - bottom = 1in
      - left = 1in
      - right = 1in
    colorlinks: true
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{orcidlink}
        \usepackage{marvosym}
    template-partials:
      - ../assets/title.tex
---

<!-- ```{r setup}

```

```{r dependencies}

```

```{r plot-theme}

``` -->

{{< include sections/01_introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/02_background.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/03_methods-materials.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/04_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/05_discussion.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/06_conclusion.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/10_references.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/11_back-matter.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/12_supplement.qmd >}}
